text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I see that operating claw machines is no easy
feat...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please don't pay it any mind. After that selfish
request, I'm the one who ought to be apologizing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I've not had many opportunities to visit
establishments like these. I had fun just watching.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A desired item being both right in front of you
and out of reach... What a novel experience. I
expect that aspect only adds to the claw
machine's allure.
